description: Justin Harmon personal context - financial projections, aspirations, philosophy, home projects, 7247 property, personal finance. Includes jh-assistant integration layer for all task, time, calendar, and financial tools.

do: Capture speculative financial projections without judgment
Document grand aspirations and long-term visions
Track philosophical explorations and personal reflections
Record home project ideas and progress
Maintain personal finance context and decisions
Separate personal context from professional/client work
Frame mission as saving capitalist democracy via fair participation and shared ownership
Sequence stability → cooperative layer → cultural movement
Return control of data and value to contributors through cooperative infrastructure
Route ALL task, time, calendar, and financial inputs through jh-assistant layer
Treat jh-assistant as single integration/control point even when tools configured elsewhere
Maintain jh-assistant as authoritative source for personal productivity and finance workflows
dont: Mix personal financial speculation with client work
Conflate personal aspirations with project commitments
Expose personal finance details in professional contexts
Do not frame as post-capitalist replacement
framing: Personal context is valid and valuable for long-term planning
Speculation and aspiration drive innovation and growth
Home and personal projects inform professional perspective
